name: Prep sheet template
description: Role-based prep tracker with quantities, cutoffs, owner names, and completion visibility for the items that protect service readiness.
source_ref: core-v2: readiness improves when prep becomes explicit, visible, and reviewable
usage_moment: Use before service and during prep handovers to verify readiness against explicit ownership.
expected_output: A prep tracker showing what is done, what is not, who owns it, and what cutoff or quantity applies.
